summary: A vertical produced clip set inside an airport terminal. Handheld footage follows officers in tactical vests, one with a yellow ERO patch and a U.S. flag patch, moving past flight-information boards and check-in counters. The clip closes on a dark card with white text reading Thank you, ICE! above the Department of Homeland Security seal.

script.scene: Close handheld view of people inside an airport terminal, slightly blurred.
An officer in a tactical vest with a yellow ERO patch and U.S. flag patch stands near a flight-information board and counters.
A dark closing card over a terminal background reads Thank you, ICE! above the Department of Homeland Security seal.
